basic_details.job_title: BECIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 System Supervisor and Supervisors Posts
basic_details.short_information: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) Supervisors (System Supervisor/S&T, Civil, Safety) Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. 553 on the official website https://www.becil.com. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the BECIL Supervisors Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation shall be applicable as per Government of India (GoI) guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Three-year Full-time Regular Diploma in Engineering, Four-year Full-time Regular B.E./B.Tech. Degree, M.E./M.Tech. in Safety Engineering, B.E./B.Tech. in Fire & Safety Engineering
qualification.details: System Supervisor/ S&T: Three-year Full-time Regular Diploma or Four-year Full-time Regular B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering / ECE / CSE / IT from Government recognized Institute/University. Supervisor (Civil): Three-year Full-time Regular Diploma or Four-year Full-time Regular B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering from Government recognized Institute/University. Supervisor (Safety): M.E./M.Tech. in Safety Engineering with B.E./B.Tech. in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical or B.E./B.Tech. in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical with one-year full-time Degree/Diploma in Safety or B.E./B.Tech. in Fire & Safety Engineering (min 60% marks/CGPA 6.0).

selection_process: Scrutiny and Shortlisting based on eligibility Interview/Assessment/Skill Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BECIL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.broadcast_engineering_consultants_india_: Three-year Full-time Regular Diploma in Engineering, Four-year Full-time Regular B.E./B.Tech. Degree, M.E./M.Tech. in Safety Engineering, B.E./B.Tech. in Fire & Safety Engineering

content_sections.heading: BECIL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BECIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BECIL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BECIL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: System Supervisor/ S&T: Three-year Full-time Regular Diploma or Four-year Full-time Regular B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering / ECE / CSE / IT from Government recognized Institute/University. Supervisor (Civil): Three-year Full-time Regular Diploma or Four-year Full-time Regular B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering from Government recognized Institute/University. Supervisor (Safety): M.E./M.Tech. in Safety Engineering with B.E./B.Tech. in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical or B.E./B.Tech. in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical with one-year full-time Degree/Diploma in Safety or B.E./B.Tech. in Fire & Safety Engineering (min 60% marks/CGPA 6.0).

content_sections.heading: BECIL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation shall be applicable as per Government of India (GoI) guidelines.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: BECIL Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny and Shortlisting based on eligibility Interview/Assessment/Skill Test Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BECIL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

title: BECIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 System Supervisor and Supervisors Posts
